message:
feat: Add Ghostty VT parser and WebKit terminal renderer

- Add Ghostty as submodule for terminal emulation
- Create terminal.zig wrapper with C ABI exports for Swift
- Build WebKit-based terminal renderer using GPU-accelerated Canvas
- Add terminal.html with full terminal emulation in JavaScript
- Export cell grid buffer for efficient Swift → WebKit transfer
- Wire up Zig terminal parser to Swift and WebKit pipeline

Architecture:
- Zig: Ghostty VT parser → Cell grid → C ABI
- Swift: Bridge to WebKit via WKScriptMessageHandler
- WebKit: Canvas 2D GPU-accelerated rendering

files.patch:
@@ -1,3 +1,6 @@
 [submodule "vendor/llama.cpp"]
 	path = vendor/llama.cpp
 	url = https://github.com/ggerganov/llama.cpp
+[submodule "vendor/ghostty"]
+	path = vendor/ghostty
+	url = https://github.com/ghostty-org/ghostty.git

@@ -13,6 +13,9 @@ let package = Package(
         .executableTarget(
             name: "ZellApp",
             path: "ZellApp",
+            resources: [
+                .copy("Resources/terminal.html")
+            ],
             swiftSettings: [
                 .unsafeFlags(["-parse-as-library"])
             ]

@@ -0,0 +1,131 @@ +import SwiftUI +import WebKit + +/// WebKit-based terminal view with GPU-accelerated Canvas rendering +struct WebKitTerminalView: NSViewRepresentable { + @ObservedObject var viewModel: ZellViewModel + + func makeNSView(context: Context) -> WKWebView { + let config = WKWebViewConfiguration() + config.userContentController.add(context.coordinator, name: "zell") + + let webView = WKWebView(frame: .zero, configuration: config) + webView.setValue(false, forKey: "drawsBackground") + + // Load terminal HTML from resources or development path + let resourcePath = Bundle.main.resourcePath ?? "" + let htmlPath = resourcePath + "/Resources/terminal.html" + + if FileManager.default.fileExists(atPath: htmlPath) { + let url = URL(fileURLWithPath: htmlPath) + webView.loadFileURL(url, allowingReadAccessTo: url.deletingLastPathComponent()) + } else { + // Development fallback + let devPath = FileManager.default.currentDirectoryPath + "/app/ZellApp/Resources/terminal.html" + if FileManager.default.fileExists(atPath: devPath) { + let url = URL(fileURLWithPath: devPath) + webView.loadFileURL(url, allowingReadAccessTo: url.deletingLastPathComponent()) + } else { + // Inline fallback + webView.loadHTMLString(Self.fallbackHTML, baseURL: nil) + } + } + + context.coordinator.webView = webView + context.coordinator.viewModel = viewModel + + return webView + } + + func updateNSView(_ nsView: WKWebView, context: Context) {} + + func makeCoordinator() -> Coordinator { + Coordinator() + } + + class Coordinator: NSObject, WKScriptMessageHandler { + weak var webView: WKWebView? + weak var viewModel: ZellViewModel? + + func userContentController(_ controller: WKUserContentController, didReceive message: WKScriptMessage) { + guard let body = message.body as? [String: Any], + let type = body["type"] as? String else { return } + + switch type { + case "prompt": + guard let text = body["text"] as? String else { return } + let model = body["model"] as? String + viewModel?.sendPromptViaWebKit(text, model: model, webView: webView) + + case "ready": + // WebKit is ready, send models + sendModels() + + default: + break + } + } + + func sendModels() { + guard let vm = viewModel else { return } + let models = vm.models + guard let json = try? JSONSerialization.data(withJSONObject: models), + let jsonStr = String(data: json, encoding: .utf8) else { return } + + DispatchQueue.main.async { [weak self] in + self?.webView?.evaluateJavaScript("zellAPI.setModels(\(jsonStr))", completionHandler: nil) + } + } + } + + static let fallbackHTML = """ + + + + + + +

Terminal HTML not found

+

Please build the app properly or run from the correct directory.

+ + + """ +} + +// MARK: - ViewModel Extension for WebKit + +extension ZellViewModel { + func sendPromptViaWebKit(_ prompt: String, model: String?, webView: WKWebView?) { + guard !isProcessing else { return } + + isProcessing = true + status = "Thinking..." + + let zellBridge = ZellBridge() + + zellBridge.run( + prompt: prompt, + model: model, + onOutput: { output in + let escaped = output + .replacingOccurrences(of: "\\", with: "\\\\") + .replacingOccurrences(of: "\"", with: "\\\"") + .replacingOccurrences(of: "\n", with: "\\n") + .replacingOccurrences(of: "\r", with: "\\r") + DispatchQueue.main.async { + webView?.evaluateJavaScript("zellAPI.appendOutput(\"\(escaped)\")", completionHandler: nil) + } + }, + onComplete: { [weak self] error in + let errorStr = error.map { "\"\($0.localizedDescription)\"" } ?? "null" + DispatchQueue.main.async { + webView?.evaluateJavaScript("zellAPI.complete(\(errorStr))", completionHandler: nil) + self?.isProcessing = false + self?.status = error == nil ? "Ready" : "Error" + } + } + ) + } +}
